name: Tuscan Spinach Torta
recipeIngredient: 15 oz Pkg Pillsbury Refrigerated Pie Crusts
recipeInstructions:
----------------------------------FILLING----------------------------------
1/4 c Unsalted butter
9 oz Pkg Green Giant Harvest Fresh Frozen Spinach, thawed & drained
1/2 c Chopped red onion
1/4 c Chopped sun-dried tomatoes without oil
1/2 tsp Dried Italian seasoning
1/2 tsp Dried oregano leaves
1/4 tsp Garlic powder
1/4 tsp Salt
4 Eggs, beaten
2 cups Shredded mozzarella cheese
1/4 cup Pine nuts or slivered almonds, toasted
To toast nuts, spread on cookie sheet; bake at 350°F for 3 to 6 minutes or until light golden brown, stirring occasionally.
Heat oven to 450°F. Prepare pie crust according to package directions for one-crust baked shell using a 10-inch springform pan (or 9-inch pie pan). Refrigerate remaining crust for later use. Place prepared crust in pan; press into bottom and up sides of pan. Trim edges if necessary. Spread mustard over bottom of crust. Bake for 9 to 11 minutes or until crust is lightly browned. Reduce oven to 350°F. Melt butter in a large skillet over medium-low heat. Add spinach, onion and tomatoes; cook and stir 5 to 7 minutes or until onion is crisp-tender. Remove from heat. Add Italian seasoning, oregano, garlic powder and salt; mix well. In a large bowl, combine eggs and cheese; mix well. Stir in spinach mixture. Spoon evenly into partially baked crust; sprinkle pine nuts evenly over top, pressing slightly. Bake for 25 to 35 minutes or until filling and pine nuts are golden brown. Let stand 10 minutes.
